item.title: Who has the monopoly on political violence?

Zohran Mamdani talks to Mehdi Hasan about political violence. source: https://www.instagram.com/zeteonews/
Jasmine Crockett on where the threats are coming from. Source: Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett's Instagram. https://www.instagram.com/repjasmine/

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @shlives did this piece not long ago. Check out their posts for some great work they've done!
27 Man Tax: Sebastian Stan
“Never be afraid to raise your voice for honesty and truth and compassion, against injustice and lying and greed.” - William Faulkner I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, thank you so much.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: We’re too busy dancing to get knocked off our feet

item.dc:creator: xbadxfaeriex

item.description: Oct 7 - the day israel ignored warning from its neighbours regarding an imminent attack from Hamas, the day israel down many IDF soldiers along the Gaza wall, the day when so many surveillance cameras had their footage go missing, the day it took several hours for the IDF to respond to the worst crisis in many years on israeli soil, the day when the IDF rained hellfire down with tank shells and apache missiles on their own troops and civilians killing dozens if not hundreds, the day when we are STILL waiting for an official report on what actually happened nearly two long years later - NEVER FORGET OCT 7 FOLKS
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Watch
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Bean has decided the new carrier is the best place to sleep. Sorry for another late post. Can someone tell life that I'd like to get back into the slow lane? The fast lane is kicking my ass and the dude behind me won't lay off the horn.
